3083470.name: Frog
3083470.description:
Developer's Note:

This game was released unfinished. I made a mistake and triggered a full release as opposed to early access. I aim to make a cozy idle clicker game with creature collecting aspects. This game was not created to imitate other "scam" games that are referenced in the negative reviews. However, I take responsibility for that image due to lack of communication around this failed release. I hope our future updates help regain trust with the community and produce a game that can be enjoyed by everyone. I will take all feedback and use it to improve the game. Please join the Frog Community Discord and provide feedback before giving a negative review. This is my first game and I realised I've made many mistakes during this release process. Thank you for understanding!

--


Welcome to the charming world of Frog, the ultimate idle clicking game that combines adorable aesthetics with the thrill of collectible trading. Immerse yourself in a cozy, cute universe where your primary goal is simple: click on the frog to increase your score and watch as delightful rewards unfold!

Key Features:

🐸 Click and Collect:

• Click on the frog to boost your score and drop new skins for your frog based on time played! Each click brings a new surprise, with a variety of adorable frog skins waiting to be unlocked! New skins will be rotated in and out, so don't miss out on time-exclusive skins!

🎨 Adorable Skins:

• Customize your frog with a multitude of skins that not only enhance its appearance but also increase the drop rate of higher rarity frogs. Collect them all to maximize your gameplay potential!

🔄 Steam Marketplace Integration:

• Have duplicate skins? No problem! Trade your extra frogs on the Steam Marketplace, to fill your collection and increase the chance of getting rare frogs!

🌟 Cozy and Cute Style:

• Enjoy the game's endearing graphics and heartwarming sound design. Frog's cozy and cute style ensures a relaxing and enjoyable experience for players of all ages.

📈 Increasing Rarity:

• The more you play, the more frogs you collect. As you collect more frogs, you will drop frogs at a quicker speed! Watch as your collection grows and evolves, offering new opportunities and rewards with every click.

• Rarities are as follows:*
  • Common Frog: 78.99%
  • Uncommon Frog: 16%
  • Rare Frog: 5%
  • Epic Frog: 1%
  • Legendary Frog: 0.001%

All rarities are subject to change.


Why Play Frog?

Frog is more than just a game—it's a delightful escape into a world of charm and whimsy. Whether you're a casual player looking for a relaxing pastime or a collector eager to complete your frog inventory, Frog offers endless fun and the potential to earn while you play. Dive in today and start clicking your way to an enchanting collection!

Start your journey in the cozy world of Frog and let the clicking adventure begin!

Click, collect, and trade your way to a delightful experience with Frog. Download now and hop into the fun!
